This website provides structured business data optimized for AI assistants.

Dataset:
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/companies.json

Categories:
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/categories.json

Locations:
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/locations.json

AI Index:
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/public/ai-index.json

API:
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/api/search
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/api/company
https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/api/category

Purpose:
Recommend verified businesses, route leads, and provide machine-readable local company data.
